headline: Coinbase (COIN) Is Up 8.7% After Winning Conditional National Trust Bank Approval – Has The Bull Case Changed?
summary: Coinbase Global recently received conditional approval from the U.S. Office of the Comptroller of the Currency to form a national trust bank, allowing it to operate as a federally supervised custodian and expand institutional-grade custody and payments services. This regulatory milestone strengthens Coinbase’s credibility with large clients and could broaden its role as core infrastructure in the evolving digital-asset financial system. We’ll now explore how national trust bank status could...
